title: Bayer India Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bayer India Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bayer India Capital India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Bayer India Capital India:
Bayer India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bayer India Capital India!
